title: Crepinella huberi
taxonomy: Crepinella huberi is a species of fungus, specifically a lichenicolous fungus, which means it grows on lichens. The classification of Crepinella huberi is within the kingdom Fungi, phylum Ascomycota, class Dothideomycetes, order Trypetheliales, and family Trypetheliaceae. This classification places Crepinella huberi within a group of fungi that are commonly found in tropical regions. The exact classification of Crepinella huberi is still being researched and refined by mycologists. Further studies are needed to fully understand the relationships between Crepinella huberi and other species within its family.
